documentation_impact.rationale: The implementation changes operator-facing documentation and governance/reference surfaces for CI, compliance tooling, and MCP read handlers, so documentation-impact obligations apply and were handled in-task.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: The task preserves AGENTS working-agreement constraints by keeping changes local, honoring human ratification gates, and producing the required ship-stage policy artifact for governed commit readiness.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: The artifact records explicit documentation-impact and policy reasoning, satisfying constitutional stewardship requirements for traceability and post-task governance decisions.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: The delivered CI and compliance hardening supports PRD goals for reliable supervised pipelines, durable institutional memory, and auditable operator-controlled progression.
